creator: axioplase@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

2012/2/25 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of lang/gambit-c,
> Please note that PR ports/165458 has just been submitted.
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/165458

I approve this patch.

Thanks for taking care of it.

--=20
Fran=C3=A7ais, English, =E6=97=A5=E6=9C=AC=E8=AA=9E, =ED=95=9C=EA=B5=AD=EC=
